---
name: Pull request
about: Submit a change to MemoirAI
title: "[PR] "
---

## What does this PR do?

A clear and concise description of the changes.

## Related issue

Closes #<issue_number> (if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition

## How has this been tested?

Describe the tests you ran:
- [ ] Backend lint passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Manual test in dev mode
- [ ] Manual test in EXE mode
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have added a CHANGELOG entry under "## Unreleased"
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked that no personal data / API keys are committed

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes. **REMINDER**: redact personal data.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the PR here.
